Bug Fix 2: checklist.ts Line 8 radiographic item does NOT have hasUpload property - VERIFIED (was removed)
Bug Fix 3: procedures/[id].tsx Lines 655-667 shows CaseImplantPlanning with Phase 1 banner for pending_phase1 - VERIFIED
